# ChatGPT still leads the chatbot market but its dominance is slipping as Google's Gemini gains ground

Matthias Bastian

ChatGPT still dominates the chatbot market, but its lead is shrinking. New data from Similarweb shows OpenAI's chatbot accounted for just 61.7 percent of global AI web traffic in February 2026, down from 75.7 percent twelve months earlier. The biggest winner is Google Gemini, which more than quadrupled its share from 5.7 percent to 24.4 percent over the same

trends.answer: By 2026, MCP is expected to fully integrate into enterprise AI operations, enabling seamless interoperability and standardizing agent-to-tool interactions. Agentic AI market growth is projected to surge, with 40% of enterprise applications embedding AI agents. The adoption of MCP will enhance automation, security, and governance in enterprise AI systems.

snippets.title: 2026 Industrial AI Trends: Agentic Systems in Manufacturing
snippets.snippet:
### Q2: How do the A2A and MCP protocols work together?

A: The Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol acts as a universal language so agents from different vendors can collaborate. The Model Context Protocol (MCP) provides the “real-time vision,” connecting these agents to live industrial data sources (like BigQuery or sensor databases) so their decisions are based on current reality rather than outdated training data.

### Q3: Does this mean fewer jobs on the factory floor?

mcp_ecosystem.query: MCP model context protocol ecosystem tools servers 2025 2026 growth
mcp_ecosystem.answer: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is widely adopted in 2025, with significant growth in remote servers. By 2026, MCP's scalability and metadata standards are being improved for production use. Major tech companies back MCP for platform engineering.

snippets.title: The Model Context Protocol's impact on 2025 - Thoughtworks
snippets.snippet: There are currently tens of thousands of MCP servers available, all for different tasks, challenges and tools. Many are curated and searchable on marketplace-style directories, such as MCP.so. And although some MCP servers are built by major players in the industry and tied to specific products or tools, the reason the space is so vibrant is that people are building their own MCP servers to tackle common challenges. This is one of the reasons we put FastMCP (Languages and Frameworks/Trial) on Te

snippets.title: The 10 Best MCP Servers for Platform Engineers in 2026 - StackGen
snippets.snippet:
1. What is an MCP server and why do platform engineers need them?    
   
 An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server is a standardized interface that enables AI coding assistants to interact with external tools and services through natural language commands. Platform engineers need them because they eliminate the constant context switching between IDEs, terminals, cloud consoles, monitoring dashboards, and incident management systems. Instead of running manual commands or clicking through web inter

snippets.title: MCP Adoption Statistics 2025
snippets.snippet:
It’s relatively easy for a hobbyist or casual developer to spin up a local MCP server, even if it doesn’t solve a real problem. Remote MCP servers, on the other hand, are harder to launch and maintain (but easier for end users), which is why larger organizations typically choose remote servers.

> Deploying a remote MCP server takes more effort and confidence in customer demand than deploying a local one. As a result, the growth of remote MCP servers is a strong proxy for MCP’s overall value and

snippets.title: Top 10 AI Trends 2025: How Agentic AI and MCP Changed IT | Splunk
snippets.snippet: With the development and widespread adoption of Model Context Protocol (MCP) in 2025 as the universal protocol for AI-native APIs, the use cases for AI continued to expand even further (check out this short YouTube video to learn more about MCP). MCP enables AI apps and agents to interact seamlessly across tools, data sources, and environments through a standardized client/server architecture. MCP drove key enhancements to SecOps, ITOps, NetOps, and Observability workflows such as human-in-the-l

snippets.title: MCP's biggest growing pains for production use will soon be solved
snippets.snippet:
The project’s open source credentials helped it gain traction among developers building AI assistants and agent-style applications. Rather than writing custom integrations for each system, teams could expose those servicesvia MCP servers, allowing models to interact with them using the same protocol.

Over the past year, a growing ecosystem of AI companies and developer platforms has begun adding support for MCP. Anthropic’s own Claude assistants use it to interact with external tools, while oth

snippets.title: MCP's Next Phase: Inside the November 2025 Specification - Medium
snippets.snippet:
## The Road to November: What MCP Looked Like in June

The June 2025 specification established the first stable model of MCP for connecting agents to external tools and data sources. It defined how a server could expose capabilities, how clients could discover resources and prompts, and how structured tool invocation worked. It enabled early interoperability in agent ecosystems without requiring every integration to be a custom API.

However, the June version had notable limitations that restric

snippets.title: A Year of MCP: From Internal Experiment to Industry Standard - Pento
snippets.snippet:
November 2025: The spec gets major updates: asynchronous operations, statelessness, server identity, and an official community-driven registry for discovering MCP servers.6

December 2025: Anthropic donates MCP to the newly formed Agentic AI Foundation (AAIF) under the Linux Foundation. OpenAI and Block join as co-founders, with AWS, Google, Microsoft, Cloudflare, and Bloomberg as supporting members.7

The numbers tell the story: 97 million monthly SDK downloads across Python and TypeScript. Ove

snippets.title: The Zuplo State of MCP Report
snippets.snippet:
## MCP in 2026

The protocol itself is still evolving. New patterns like Code Mode, originally outlined by Cloudflare, supported by Goose, and further supported by Claude are emerging to help agents handle larger tool sets and chain calls more efficiently.

This kind of iteration does, however, present a possible challenge to MCP in the longer term. The core protocol provides the standardization the ecosystem needs, but implementation approaches, brought on by the challenges increased and varied

snippets.title: 多个中国产品登上全球AI应用百强榜，DeepSeek位列第四 - 新浪财经
snippets.snippet:
# 多个中国产品登上全球AI应用百强榜，DeepSeek位列第四

近日，硅谷知名风投机构 a16z 发布第六版《顶级100款生成式 AI 消费级应用》榜单，以近期 SimilarWeb 网页访问量与 SensorTower 移动MAU为核心排名依据，清晰呈现全球AI应用竞争格局。自2020年起，a16z已连续六年追踪并评选生成式AI产品。

榜单核心格局呈现“头部稳固、中国公司阵营崛起”的特征。

ChatGPT 仍稳居全球第一，其网页端月流量是第二名 Gemini 的2.7倍，移动端月活用户约为 Gemini 的2.5倍，周活跃用户规模达9亿，规模接近大型平台级应用。

但竞争日趋激烈，据 Yipit Data 截至2026年1月的数据显示，Claude 的美国付费订阅用户同比增长超200%，Gemini 的美国付费订阅用户同比增长达258%，且约20%的 ChatGPT 网页端周活用户同一周也会使用 Gemini ，多平台使用现象凸显。

a16z认为，下一阶段竞争的关键，是谁能成为用户的“默认AI入口”。

中国阵营的集体崛起成为本期榜单最大亮点。其中，DeepSeek 以网页

2026年3月11日，硅谷知名风投机构a16z发布第六版《顶级100款生成式AI消费级应用》榜单，以网页访问量与移动端月活用户（MAU）为核心指标，揭示全球AI应用竞争格局。中国AI应用表现惊艳，DeepSeek以网页端全球第四的成绩成为排名最高的中国应用，豆包、Kimi、可灵AI等20余款产品跻身前50，标志着中国AI从“技术追赶”迈向“全球领跑”。

在AI技术应用方面,1688取得突破性进展。1688推出免费AI数字员工，具备成本核算与报价逻辑的专业能力，平均节省4个人力，生意难度降低80%。1688已接入DeepSeek大模型，2025年2月中旬开始陆续向商家开放。2025年3月起,1688全面升级APP，围绕用AI让买家找新品更简单、货盘管理更简单、采购全链路全面引入AI等五大方向，全面改善买家体验和提升采购效率，充分展现了AI赋能B2B电商的巨大潜力。

中國生成式AI應用層快速擴大存在感，其中DeepSeek躍上全球AI應用第四。（路透）

美國矽谷知名創投機構Andreessen Horowitz（a16z）發布一份榜單，中國團隊正在生成式AI應用層快速擴大存在感，其中，深度求索（DeepSeek）以網頁端全球第四的成績，成為當前排名最高的中國AI應用。

界面新聞報導，a16z發布第六版「頂級100款生成式AI消費級應用」榜單，以近期網站流量與競爭分析工具（SimilarWeb）網頁訪問量，與行動應用市場分析平台（SensorTower）行動月活躍用戶（MAU）為核心排名依據，呈現全球AI應用競爭格局。

自2020年起，a16z已連續六年追蹤並評選生成式AI產品。其中ChatGPT仍穩居全球第一，網頁端月流量是第二名Gemini的2.7倍，行動端月活躍用戶數約為Gemini的2.5倍，周活躍使用

snippets.snippet: Israel’s tech industry, often dubbed the “Startup Nation,” has embraced AI tools perhaps more than any other, making Israeli developers some of the most aggressive adopters of AI in their workflows.
